body:
Gives the garden template a visual identity distinct from literature-template, which keeps its blue-lavender look. Moss/fern green accents on warm paper (light mode), deep foliage tones (dark mode), Fraunces for headers; body/code fonts unchanged.

The whole change is theme tokens in `quartz.config.yaml` — `custom.scss` has no hardcoded hues (verified), so shared plumbing stays mergeable across the template family.

Verified with side-by-side headless-Chrome screenshots against literature-template (desktop landing, note page, true-390px mobile emulation) — no layout drift, mobile clean, `npm run check` + build pass.

Stacked on #3 (landing/mobile-nav fixes); merge that first.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSJ1viQV4pp3hcWo9u5oPV

title: Garden visual identity: botanical palette + Fraunces headers
